MIDDLE-OF-STORY EXAMPLES
‣ “It was right then when I knew she had cheated on me…and it was
all my fault.”
‣ 	“She burst into my office screaming…I reached for the phone to dial
9-11…her face was turning red…I thought she was dying…but it was
even worse than I imagined. 	I’ll tell you what happened to my
assistant Sharron in a few minutes, right after I share the DANGERS
of _____.”
‣ When I looked at her and what she held in her hand, I said to
myself… “I may repent of this on my deathbed”…and I still MAY…but
it took my mother’s pain away.”
